title: MISTAKE: Reported completion before exact main merge commit was fully
content:
What went wrong: Reported completion before exact main merge commit was fully green and before temp branch/worktree cleanup was finished. Release workflow allowed routine merges without version bumps to fail main.
How to avoid: Require exact-main verification before completion claims and make publish workflow a no-op success when package version tag already exists, while adding CI evidence that only version-bump merges attempt a publish.
Rubric weighted score: 0
Guardrails failed: testsPassed
